title: Study
disabled: Study is currently disabled for this environment.
headline: {{dueCount}} due, {{newCount}} new

motion.unsupported: Shake to undo is not available on this device.
motion.denied: Shake to undo is off because motion access was denied.
motion.prompt: Shake to undo is available after motion access is granted.

focus.empty: No cards are ready right now. Import more cards or come back when something is due.
focus.revealHint: Tap, click, or press space to reveal

overview.readyDescription: Start a focused review mode that only shows the card and grading controls.
overview.empty: Import your `日本語` deck or create a card to start studying here.
overview.loadStrategyDescription: The dashboard only loads counts. Cards are fetched when study actually begins.
overview.keyboardDescription: `Space` reveals. `1` again. `2` hard. `3` good. `4` easy. `Cmd+Z` undoes. On mobile, shake also undoes.

settings.title: Study settings
settings.description: Control how new cards enter review and arrange the order they appear in.
settings.dailyLimitDescription: Due review cards are always shown first. New cards are added after reviews up to this daily limit.
settings.queueDescription: Drag cards into the order they should be introduced.
settings.emptyQueue: No new cards are waiting in the queue.

editor.title: Edit card
editor.description: Save returns you to the front of this card in review mode.

browse.title: Browse cards
browse.description: Search notes, inspect imported fields, and preview cards without changing scheduling.
browse.noMatches: No notes match the current filters.
browse.selectNote: Select a note to preview it.

create.title: Create study card
create.description: This first pass keeps creation intentionally focused: recognition, production, and cloze cards only, with answer-side audio generated automatically when needed.
create.success: Created {{cardType}} card and seeded it into the study queue.

history.title: Study history
history.description: Review events stay immutable so imported Anki history and future ConvoLab reviews can be exported together later.
history.showingOptions: Showing first {{shown}} of {{total}} cards in the filter dropdown.

import.title: Import Anki deck
import.description: V1 imports only the <1>日本語</1> deck from a full <3>.colpkg</3> backup so ConvoLab can preserve scheduler state, review history, and media references.
import.wrongExtension: Please choose a .colpkg Anki collection backup.
import.tooLarge: Study imports can be up to {{maxGb}} GB. Please choose a smaller .colpkg file.
import.behaviorDeck: Only cards from the `日本語` deck are ingested in this version.
import.behaviorMedia: Imported media is preserved when present, and missing answer-side audio is backfilled through ConvoLab TTS when cards are first used.
import.largeFileHint: Large .colpkg files up to {{maxGb}} GB upload directly to private storage before processing.
import.queued: Upload finished. Waiting for the import worker to start…
import.processing: Import is running in the background. This can take a while for large decks with media.
import.processingTimedOut: The upload finished, but the import is still running. You can stay on this page or refresh later to check status.
import.success: Imported {{cardCount}} cards and {{reviewLogCount}} review logs from {{deckName}}.
import.skippedMedia_one: Skipped {{count}} unsafe or missing media reference.
import.skippedMedia_other: Skipped {{count}} unsafe or missing media references.

routeError.title: Study hit a snag
routeError.description: Something went wrong in the study flow. You can retry this view or jump back to the main study dashboard.
